what: Defect triage for FSC-2417: 0 defect(s), 0 critical — verdict=PASS
why: All test phases for FSC-2417 returned clean results: CRT Self-Heal, FCA Scenarios, and Financial Integrity all passed with no failures, regulatory gaps, or data violations. CRT and Performance were skipped but raised no concerns, and no suspect tests or self-heal anomalies were identified. There are no defects requiring resolution before release.
